'''Destabilization''', also known as '''Destab''', was a branch of [[Imperial Intelligence/Legends|Imperial Intelligence's]] [[Bureau of Operations/Legends|Bureau of Operations]]. Their operations were kept quiet, as details of their activities—which ranged from legitimate Intelligence operations to full scale atrocities—were enough to make most agents sick. Officially, their mandate was to unravel the fabric of society.<ref name="ISB" />

During the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], a team of Destabilization Branch infiltrators traveled to the [[City/Legends|city]] [[Morjanssik]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Dac/Legends|Mon Calamari]] and enacted the [[Calamari Project]], a covert operation that aimed to spark a war between the [[Mon Calamari/Legends|Mon Calamari]] and [[Quarren/Legends|Quarren]] [[Species/Legends|species]], to prevent the two species from supplying [[Starship/Legends|starships]] to the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]]. However, a group of Alliance agents tracked down and defeated the infiltrators, bringing the Calamari Project to an end.<ref name="DitU">''[[Death in the Undercity]]''</ref>

[[Secesh Trant]],<ref name="C72 Ananuru Express">{{ChallengeCite|72|Ananuru Express (article)}}</ref> [[General/Legends|General]] [[Harrid Sendo]],<ref name="SotESB">''[[Shadows of the Empire Sourcebook]]''</ref> and [[Major/Legends|Major]] [[Kerri Lessev/Legends|Kerri Lessev]] worked in the organization.<ref name="CRO">''[[Cracken's Rebel Operatives]]''</ref>
